entries.speaker: elder_thessa
lines:
Despair Wards. Won't find them anywhere else.
Compact tried to forge equivalents — failed. Can't industrialize
spirit-work.

entries.speaker: elder_thessa
lines: Roothollow is grey now. But the recipes are here.

entries.speaker: keeper_elara
lines:
The stone is cracking. I can hold it — but
not forever. There's a ley fissure nearby. If you could bring
water from it...
